title: Hot weather risks and their impact on health
body: "The aim of this slide set is to:   raise awareness of the health impacts of hot weather provide a resource that can be used to engage with partners aid in planning and decision-making for the summer   It gives an overview of the evidence base and epidemiology of heat-associated deaths.  Links to additional resources are also provided.  This material is tailored to:   national institutions, such as UKHSA, NHS England, the Department of Health and Social Care, and the Office for Health Improvement and Disparities commissioners of health and social care local authorities, integrated care boards, integrated care partnerships, directors of public health, local resilience forums and health and wellbeing boards providers of health, primary care, secondary care, social care providers community and voluntary sector   "
